behavior_summary: This script implements a small ritual/daemon scene and a suite of dialogue handlers for an Acolyte test flow. It runs staged visual/audio effects (music, fire-spell spawns, temporary items/NPC teleports) to represent a summoning/ritual, and it manages the player's progression through a sponsor/test mechanic culminating in promotion to Acolyte.

U8P_DAEMSCEN::func0080 is a compact utility that, when 'this' refers to an NPC, queues a short NPC action (orientation/movement/animation) by spawning METHOD::func15E7 with the NPC's facing — intended to make NPCs animate/orient in scripted sequences or area triggers.

U8P_DAEMSCEN::func014B performs the ritual: plays music, chooses gendered phrasing based on the acolyteKilled flag, creates and positions a temporary item/object, calls object methods and fire-spell routines, spawns short-lived helper processes (FREE::func1C19) to pace the sequence, and destroys the temporary object when done. It also assembles quest-like instruction text naming a kill target (Morduin or Sabriane depending on flags).

U8P_DAEMSCEN::func19C9 builds and mutates a menu presented to the player (Ask), captures selections via suspend, branches on strcmp results, and routes selections to other modules (BANE2/VARDION2) or to U8P_DAEMSCEN::func4172 to progress the test. It also modifies the sponsorTest state and composes progress status text from spellsCast.

U8P_DAEMSCEN::func4172 is the promotion/finalization handler: sets sponsorTest, validates distance to a target param, waits for area re-entry if aborted, and when spellsCast == 3 it places the avatar in stasis, performs sequencing (spawned FREE::func1C19 and METHOD::func091C), begins a conversation, delivers the promotion line and sets keyOfTheAcolyte to grant progression.
notable_control_flow: Menu-driven branching in U8P_DAEMSCEN::func19C9: constructs local7 (menu options), presents Item::ask, assigns suspend results to local4/local5/local0, and uses strcmp-based IfStatement nodes to route selections (forfeit, guidance, finalization).

Promotion gating in U8P_DAEMSCEN::func4172: spellsCast is checked for equality to 3 to allow the promotion sequence; if the player/target (param1) is too far or sponsorTest is cleared the flow aborts and waits on Item::enterFastArea(this) to re-arm.

Ritual sequencing in U8P_DAEMSCEN::func014B and U8P_DAEMSCEN::func0B96 uses many spawn + suspend pairs (FREE::func1C19 helper spawns and FIRESPEL spawns) to stagger effects and to teleport/animate NPCs safely via status flag toggles.
Several short monologues (U8P_DAEMSCEN::func00D1, U8P_DAEMSCEN::func4355) are simple suspend-bark sequences used as audio/behavior cues within larger flows.
open_questions: Exact numeric semantics and available action codes for METHOD::func15E7 (what action ids like local3 represent and how many distinct actions exist) — inferred as orientation/movement but not confirmed.
Precise meanings and lifetime semantics of FREE::func1C19 numeric arguments (observed values like 0x1E): appear to be delay/cleanup worker durations but the mapping to timing is unclear.

Whether U8P_DAEMSCEN::func0080 is invoked directly from an Item::enterFastArea event handler in this script (evidence suggests it is often used in area/fast-area triggers but the call site is not present in the excerpt).

The complete set of menu text strings assembled into local7 in U8P_DAEMSCEN::func19C9 and their exact strcmp match values (we see control structure but not every literal option in the decompiled snippets).

Whether any persistent world-state beyond the named flags (sponsorTest, spellsCast, keyOfTheAcolyte, acolyteKilled) is affected by the ritual (e.g., NPC ownership, spawned quest items) — descriptive evidence implies a quest instruction but no explicit global write to a quest flag besides keyOfTheAcolyte.

main_function.name: U8P_DAEMSCEN::func0080
main_function.purpose: Small utility helper that, when 'this' is an NPC, spawns/queues a short NPC action using the NPC's facing (Npc::getDir) by calling addressof(this)->METHOD::func15E7. Used to make NPCs orient/move/animate as part of scripted sequences or trigger responses.
entry_conditions: Called with 'this' pointing at an item/actor (context required).
Item::isNpc(this) must be true; otherwise the function returns without spawning actions.
Inferred typical invocation contexts: area/fast-area entry triggers or other script points where an NPC should perform a short queued action.

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMSCEN::func0080
function_map.role: NPC action/animation helper (spawn METHOD::func15E7 when 'this' is an NPC)

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMSCEN::func00D1
function_map.role: Short scream/bark emitter used for pain/impact audio cues and paced with spawn/suspend

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMSCEN::func014B
function_map.role: Ritual/daemon scene: plays music, spawns items/NPCs and fire effects, composes quest text naming a kill target

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMSCEN::func0B96
function_map.role: Dialogue/monologue branch about a daemonic presence and the acolyte Bane; includes menu-choice usage and scene choreography

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMSCEN::func19C9
function_map.role: Primary test/examination dialogue routine: builds menus, presents Ask, handles choices and routes to other modules or promotion handler

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMSCEN::func4172
function_map.role: Promotion/finalization dialogue: validates distance, gates by spellsCast==3, sequences the promotion and sets keyOfTheAcolyte

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMSCEN::func4355
function_map.role: Short dismissive monologue used when the NPC is busy; redirects player to Master Malchir

internal_calls.purpose: Route a menu selection into the promotion/finalization handler when the player chooses the option to advance or completes the test flow.

external_calls.purpose: Spawn/queue a short NPC action on the NPC (uses Npc::getDir to pass facing/direction); used to orient/move/animate NPCs.
Cast/trigger a fire-spell effect as part of the ritual sequence (visual/attack effect).
Variant or step of the fire-spell sequence used during the ritual.
Spawn a fire-spell projectile/effect at world coordinates computed from a temporary item (visual/damaging effect).
Create a temporary object to act as a ritual focal point, position it near a target, read its coordinates for effect placement, and destroy it afterwards.
Teleport an NPC into position for the scene; used with toggleStatusFlag to avoid collision/AI issues during move.
Trigger an effect/animation on an object/NPC as part of the scene choreography.
Delegate Bane-related dialogue/behavior to the BANE2 module when the corresponding menu option is selected.
Delegate additional Bane-module behavior for alternate menu choices.
Invoke Vardion-specific dialogue/behavior branches depending on the acolyteKilled flag and player choices.
Measure distance from param1 to decide whether to abort the sponsorTest/promotion flow when the player or target is too far.
Place the avatar into stasis during the promotion sequence to control player state while the promotion dialog/effects run.
Spawn short-lived helper processes to pace scream/bark timing or perform delayed cleanup.
Start ritual music to accompany the summoning sequence.
Construct and present a player menu, capture the selection via suspend, and use strcmp checks to branch on chosen option.

reads.name: acolyteKilled
reads.likely_effect: Selects gendered dialog text and which NPC name (Morduin vs Sabriane or alternate name) is referenced in ritual and accusation scenes.

reads.name: spellsCast
reads.likely_effect: Used as a progress counter (0..3) for the sponsor/test; determines which progress text is shown and gates promotion when == 3.

reads.name: sponsorTest
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether the sponsor/test forfeit flow is active and whether certain menu branches appear; read to decide forfeit handling and progression gating.

reads.name: betrayedDisciple
reads.likely_effect: Read early to choose which base menu options to present (affects tone/options of the test dialogue).

reads.name: vardionAvaName
reads.likely_effect: When set, causes a getName() capture to include an avatar's actual name in dialogue lines (used in U8P_DAEMSCEN::func0B96).

reads.name: baneAvaName
reads.likely_effect: When set, causes a getName() capture to include an avatar's actual name in dialogue lines (used in U8P_DAEMSCEN::func0B96).

writes.name: sponsorTest
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 at the start of promotion flow (U8P_DAEMSCEN::func4172) and cleared (0) when the test is aborted or after promotion completes; used to mark an active sponsor/promotion sequence.

writes.name: spellsCast
writes.likely_effect: Cleared to 0 in abort branches (resets progress) and read to check for promotion readiness; acts as a progress tracker rather than a purely read-only flag.

writes.name: keyOfTheAcolyte
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when promotion completes to grant the player Acolyte progression/privilege (represents the earned key/status).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements a small ritual/daemon scene and a suite of dialogue handlers for an Acolyte test flow. It runs staged visual/audio effects (music, fire-spell spawns, temporary items/NPC teleports) to represent a summoning/ritual, and it manages the player's progression through a sponsor/test mechanic culminating in promotion to Acolyte.
